backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing diagram state management (icons, connections, drawings, lines, text labels, images) with user profiles, save/load/delete operations, and authorization mixins for access control and blob storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three icon image replacement requirements (Multiple Server Icon.png, Command and Control.png, Domain.png) in AttackPathIcon.tsx component with high confidence test mappings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including authentication, report management, attack path visualization with drag-and-drop icons, drawing tools, image uploads, text rotation, and multi-element selection capabilities.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles defining OKLCH color system variables for light and dark themes with security-focused dark blue/teal palette and base styling for body and borders.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Threat Hunting Portal application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/index.ts: Utility snippet demonstrating html2canvas usage for exporting canvas elements to PNG data URLs for download or display.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component with TanStack Router setup, Internet Identity authentication flow, profile setup modal, theme provider, and protected routes for report management and attack path visualization.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathCanvas: Main canvas component for attack path visualization handling icon placement, connections, drawings, text labels, images, drag-and-drop, resizing, multi-element selection with drag-to-select, and mode switching between place/connect/draw.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathConnec: SVG connector component rendering arrows between icons with rotation support, selection highlighting, shortened endpoints to avoid icon overlap, and click handling for selection.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathIcon.t: Renders draggable icons for attack path diagrams, mapping IconType to asset paths and handling drag-and-drop events.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathToolba: Provides a toolbar for attack path diagram editing with drawing tools, icon palette, text formatting controls, image upload, and save/load/undo actions.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout with header navigation, hero banner on home page, and footer with branding.
frontend/src/components/LoadDiagramDialo: Dialog for loading saved attack path diagrams with list view, delete functionality, and metadata display.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Logout button component that clears Internet Identity authentication and query cache.
frontend/src/components/LoginPage.tsx: Login page UI with Internet Identity authentication trigger for accessing the threat hunt portal.
frontend/src/components/MitreTechniqueSe: Searchable combobox for selecting MITRE ATT&CK techniques with support for custom technique entries and badge display.
frontend/src/components/PdfGeneratorButt: Button component that triggers PDF generation for threat hunt reports using the print dialog.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name for profile setup, with form validation and submission using the useSaveCallerUserProfile hook.
frontend/src/components/ReportForm.tsx: Comprehensive form component for creating threat hunt reports with fields for title, author, executive summary, threat actors, MITRE techniques, IOCs, findings, timeline, and remediation actions. Includes dynamic array fields with add/remove functionality.
frontend/src/components/SaveDiagramDialo: Dialog component for saving attack path diagrams with a name input field, handling save/cancel actions and displaying loading states.
frontend/src/data/mitreAttackData.ts: Static data file containing MITRE ATT&CK technique definitions organized by tactics (Initial Access, Execution, Persistence, Privilege Escalation) with IDs, names, and descriptions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that manages the backend actor instance, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttackPathState.ts: Custom hook managing the complete state of an attack path diagram including icons, connections, drawings, text labels, images, drawing tools, selection state, and undo history with a 50-state limit.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteDiagramState: React Query mutation hook for deleting diagram states by ID, invalidating the allDiagrams query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetAllDiagrams.ts: React Query hook that fetches all saved diagrams from the backend, enabled only when the actor is available.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: React Query hook that fetches the current user's profile, with custom loading state handling that accounts for actor initialization.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetDiagramState.ts: React Query hook that fetches a specific diagram by ID from the backend, enabled only when the actor is available.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for report CRUD operations (get all, get by ID, save, delete) but all methods are disabled/stubbed since backend no longer supports report functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: React Query mutation hook that saves the current user's profile via the actor and invalidates the user profile cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveDiagramState.t: React Query mutation hook that saves a named diagram state via the actor and invalidates both diagram state and all diagrams caches on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI components using oklch color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient provider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication.
frontend/src/pages/AttackPathPage.tsx: Main page component for creating attack path diagrams with canvas, toolbar, and dialogs for saving/loading diagrams, managing icons, connections, drawings, text labels, and images.
frontend/src/pages/CreateReportPage.tsx: Page component with a form for creating threat hunt reports, handling submission via useSaveReport mutation and navigating back on success.
frontend/src/pages/ReportDetailPage.tsx: Displays detailed view of a single threat hunt report with sections for executive summary, timeline, attack vectors, evidence, affected systems, remediation, and recommendations, plus PDF download functionality.
frontend/src/pages/ReportListPage.tsx: React component that displays a table of threat hunting reports with metadata, MITRE techniques count, IOCs count, and actions (view, download PDF, delete). Includes loading states, error handling, and empty state UI.
frontend/src/types/html2canvas.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file for html2canvas library type definitions.
frontend/src/types/jspdf.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file for jspdf library type definitions.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Utility function that generates a printable PDF report by opening a new window with styled HTML content including report metadata, threat actors, MITRE techniques, IOCs, and analysis sections.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support for maintaining state across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended theme with sidebar colors, custom animations, typography plugin, and container queries support.
frontend/vite.config.ts: Vite build configuration for React app with path aliases, environment variable injection for canisters, API proxy to local dfx server, and optimized build settings.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking three feature requests to replace icon images at specific XPath locations with uploaded PNG files (Multiple Server Icon, Command and Control, Domain).
